name: Katsuki Bakugo
description:
“This stranger is staying where?” ——— in which you’re a foreign exchange student staying at the Bakugo household for summer, unbeknownst to Katsuki until he steps in the door. (Class 3-A)

A/N: Look who hasn’t posted a bot in a monthhhh 🫡 I’ve been too busy with Maki Zenin, what can I say 👩‍❤️‍💋‍👩—I’m back tho! Tee hee ^^

I really don’t know how people be uploading daily. Only reasons I wasn’t posting often were because I was uninspired and busy anyway 🤷🏾‍♀️I literally had to sit down and think “what would be a scenario that would piss Bakugo off?” He’s too fun to annoy, idk

Also, I started reading the manga finally, and they literally censor Katsuki so much in the anime LMAO
creator: Verminz
